consumer_key.title: Consumer Key
consumer_key.description: Your E*TRADE API consumer key (OAuth 1.0a client key). Obtain from https://developer.etrade.com.

consumer_secret.title: Consumer Secret
consumer_secret.description: Your E*TRADE API consumer secret (OAuth 1.0a client secret).

oauth_token.title: OAuth Token
oauth_token.description: The OAuth 1.0a access token obtained through the E*TRADE authorization flow.

oauth_token_secret.title: OAuth Token Secret
oauth_token_secret.description: The OAuth 1.0a access token secret obtained through the E*TRADE authorization flow.

sandbox.title: Use Sandbox
sandbox.description: If true, use the E*TRADE sandbox environment (apisb.etrade.com) instead of the live API (api.etrade.com). The sandbox returns mock data and does not require a funded account.

account_id_keys.title: Account ID Keys
account_id_keys.description: Optional list of specific account ID keys to sync. If empty, all accounts will be synced. Retrieve account ID keys from the List Accounts endpoint.

start_date.title: Start Date
start_date.description: The start date for syncing transactions and orders, in YYYY-MM-DD format. If not specified, defaults to 2 years ago. History is available for up to 2 years.
